nasb.text: Saul hurled the spear for he thought, “I will pin David to the wall.” But David escaped from his presence twice.

esv.text: And Saul hurled the spear, for he thought, “I will pin David to the wall.” But David evaded him twice.

cnv.text: 掃羅把槍擲過去，心裡說：“我要把大衛刺在牆上。”大衛兩次避開了他。

ccb.text: 他突然把矛投向大卫，心想：“我要把他刺透，钉在墙上。”他投了两次，大卫都躲过了。
